classic.prompt_additions: in the style of Rembrandt, old masters technique, dark chiaroscuro background, dramatic lighting, baroque painting

impressionist.prompt_additions: in the style of Claude Monet, impressionist painting, soft brushstrokes, dappled light, pastel colors, dreamy atmosphere

modern.prompt_additions: in the style of Van Gogh, expressive brushstrokes, vibrant colors, swirling patterns, emotional intensity
